title.en: He is like a fish like water, easy in this long...

content.en:
Baiheng Lord's main impact on the Legendary Realm Lord, this is a big event in the True Saintless Land, and many Legendary Lords are paying attention to it.

Soon.

Lord Baiheng soon began to attack the Lord of the Legendary Realm, and this time there were still many Lord of the Legendary Realm protecting the Lord of Baiheng.

Time is long.

Lord Baiheng came here, allowing the river of time to flow through his body, and the infinite power of time could not affect his body.

At this moment, he has completely controlled time, just like a fish in water, a bird in the sky, into his own realm, and the power will not harm him.

And the Lord of Baiheng controls time, and this ownerless time power will not hurt him.

He is like a fish like water, easy in this long river of time.

Around.

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords guarded to prevent the Legendary Realm Lords from disturbing the Baiheng Lords.

"Lord Baiheng, don't worry about breaking through.

Dragon Ancient Lord Dao.

"Well, thank you to all the Legendary Realm Lords this time. "

Lord Baiheng thanked.

Then, he began to break through, and everything went well.

Soon, the critical moment came when he was about to become the embodiment of time, completely becoming one with time.

At this time, several Legendary Realm Lords of the True Void Holy Land looked nervous one by one, but none of the Rising Legendary Realm Lords came to attack from beginning to end, and even the Strange Star Lords gave up.

"The Star Lord didn't come. "

Lord Longgu said.

"The Star Lord attacked once before, this time I'm afraid of our ambush, I'm afraid of losing a clone, and I'm even more afraid of losing his Star Arrow, the Star Arrow can exert great power in the empty sea, but in the long river of time, the power is average, and it may even be intercepted by us. So, he didn't dare to take any chances. "

Lord Longgu said.

"It's better not to attack than the Legendary Realm Lord, let's continue to wait, the Lord of Baiheng has passed the most critical moment, and has broken through to the Legendary Realm Lord Realm, just wait for the transformation to be completed." "

After a while, Lord Baiheng's breakthrough was completed, and he could go back and stabilize the realm.

"Thank you!"

Lord Baiheng was extremely excited.

He had been cultivating for too long a long time, and now he had finally broken through.

"Very good, our True Saintless Land has finally given birth to another Legendary Realm Lord. Lord Longgu said excitedly.

"Ladies and gentlemen, let's go back to retreat for a while, and as for that plan, when I'm done in retreat, we'll act together. "

Ignore the lord's way.

"Yes!"

Lord Dragongu said.

Afterwards, Lord Baiheng went back to retreat

In a flash, millions of eternal years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had improved a lot, especially in controlling time, he felt that he was afraid that he really had to completely control time.

"The Legendary Time Ancestor has helped me too much, and without this talent, I would not have been able to achieve such progress in terms of time. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He is ready to take a recent impact to control time, and the best place to control time is naturally the river of time

The half-step transcendence realm legendary lord is not qualified to enter the long river of time, this is the rule of the true holy land, only the half-step legendary realm lord is eligible to enter the bridge of time and comprehend time.

But.

He didn't need to go through the long river of time, he only needed to let a legendary realm lord throw a copy of his body into the long river of time, with his control over time, even if his cultivation was weak, he could hold on for a while.

He can also make continuous copies of his body, so that he can continue to comprehend the passage of time for a long time until he has complete control over time.

"Which Legendary Realm Lord can I ask for help?"

Ye Tian thought about it and decided to ask the Frostless Lord for help.

Although the Frostless Lord controls the space, as the Lord of the Legendary Realm, it is naturally possible to enter the long river of time.

So, Ye Tian came to find the frostless lord.

......

"I've seen the Frostless Lord!"

Ye Tian came to visit the Frostless Lord and said.

"Endless Lord, what's the matter?"

Lord Frostless asked.

"Lord Frostless, I want to enter the river of time, and I want to ask Lord Frostless for help. Ye Tian said.

Suddenly, the frostless lord's face changed slightly, and he said, "Ye Tian, it's not that I don't help, the rules are the rules, although you have a great credit for discovering the time Hengjin, but it is impossible for the True Saintless Land to let the half-step transcendent realm legendary lord enter the bridge of time, otherwise the other transcendent realm legendary lords are dissatisfied, once a conflict is triggered, it is a very serious matter." "

Ye Tian saw that Lord Frostless had misunderstood, so he said: "Lord Frostless, what I said is not to enter the River of Time through the Bridge of Time, but to ask Lord Frostless to throw me into the River of Time at will." "

Without the protection of the Bridge of Time, you will be shattered by the power of the River of Time in an instant, and the real River of Time is not a tributary of the River of Time that has been intercepted and transformed in the Gray Mist Stone Statue. Lord Frostless said.

"I know, but I'm sure!"

The breath of time appeared on Ye Tian's body, which was a perfect control of time.

The Frostless Lord looked at Ye Tian and saw the surging time power from Ye Tian's body, and that time power was almost comparable to the Baiheng Lord who had just broken through before.

"Take control of the time! No, it's not close.

The Frostless Lord was shocked.

Ye Tiancai's half-step transcendence realm legendary lords, he didn't even condense the legendary body, but he surpassed those half-step legendary realm lords in terms of controlling time, is this a transcendent realm cultivation?

"How did you do that?"

The Lord of Frost is incredulous

"I'm more talented!"

Ye Tian said truthfully.

"Is the talent better?" The Frostless Lord rolled his eyes, which talent is not good if he can cultivate to the Legendary Lord?

Even those peak Legendary Realm Lords, or even Eternal Masters, are not so demonic in the Legendary Lord Realm!

She seriously doubted that Ye Tian was experiencing life by some eternal master?

Of course, this is unlikely, how can any Eternal Master not be arrogant and disguise himself as a Legendary Lord.

"Okay, I promised, are you ready?"

Lord Frostless asked.

"Ready!"

Ye Tianying said.

At this time, the Frostless Lord grabbed Ye Tian with one hand, and then tore through time and threw Ye Tian into the long river of time. _
